# Dependencies for the genericity tagging + analysis pipeline.
# Covers: run_tagger.py, generalization_metric.py, metric_validation.py,
#         plotting.py, rst/*, and the Anecedotal_Discourse_Classifier_Multitext
#         submodule (pipeline.py).
#
# After install, also fetch the spaCy model the tagger loads at import:
#     python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm

# --- data & numerics ---
numpy==1.26.4
pandas==2.2.3
scipy

# --- plotting ---
matplotlib
seaborn

# --- tagging pipeline (submodule: Anecedotal_Discourse_Classifier_Multitext/pipeline.py) ---
torch==2.2.0
transformers==4.57.3
spacy
spacy-alignments
wtpsplit            # sentence segmentation used in generalization_metric.py / metric_validation.py
sty                 # colored terminal output in pipeline.py
gradio<4            # imported at module top in pipeline.py (Gradio 3.x API)

# --- I/O & reporting ---
tabulate            # tables in rst/analysis_discourse_rels_*.py
tqdm==4.66.5

# --- optional: interactive web demo only (not needed to reproduce results) ---
# flask             # Anecedotal_Discourse_Classifier_Multitext/app.py
